objective: Stratégie de Scalping sur ALTUSDC 1M. Indicateurs : BOLLINGER + STOCHASTIC + ATR. Scalp quand BOLLINGER croise en zone extrême avec STOCHASTIC aligné. Sortie sur premier signal de retournement de BOLLINGER. Stop-loss dynamique basé sur ATR (1.0x), ratio risk/reward 2.7:1.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] Potential weaknesses could be overfitting, as strategy uses 10 indicators and high customization parameters. In case of poor results, adjusting stop loss to remove outliers would help; changing the stochastic period from 80 to a lower value might also improve results. If results are mediocre, using more aggressive risk management or adding momentum indicators could increase Sharpe ratio.
[Backup plan] If strategy fails, trying a simpler approach with fewer parameters and trading fewer bars like 4H timeframe may help reduce overfitting and improve overall performance.
